summary: Round Base first, then derive tax from rounded Base, and split CGST/SGST asymmetrically so sum equals Total.
reason: Independent rounding of CGST and SGST drifted 1 paise on common amounts (₹100 @ 18% yielded 100.01). India tax filings require Base + CGST + SGST == Total. Patched per Greptile P1.
validated_outcome: New TestComputeSplit_SumEqualsTotal covers ₹100/18%, ₹99.99/12%, ₹1234.56/5%, and inter-state cases.
